text.title: BA Trends Routing Index Core Rules
text.summary: 4 testable rules every application of BA Trends Routing Index enforces.

rule.statement: Trend list has ≤8 entries (top trends only). Longer lists dilute the routing index.
rule.rationale: Excessive lists become reference tables nobody reads.

rule.statement: Each trend maps to ≥1 internal methodology slug OR explicit 'no current coverage' (gap).
rule.rationale: Unmapped trends produce zero internal action.

rule.statement: Each trend carries ≥1 evidence URL (industry report, survey, analyst note).
Index carries last_reviewed ISO date + reviewer name; stale beyond 12 months flagged on read.
